title: thelypteris wenzhouensis
intro: Thelypteris wenzhouensis, also known as the Wenzhou maiden fern, is a species of fern within the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris wenzhouensis include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
